title: Send Me A Leaf
content:
Send me a leaf, but from a bush
That grows at least one half hour
Away from your house, then
You must go and will be strong, and I
Thank you for the pretty leaf.
meaning:
Bertolt Brecht's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Send Me A Leaf"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
